summary: Lead accepts M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 after systems_architect R3 ACCEPT of the CI/API-boundary fix. The accepted implementation includes deterministic M6 diplomacy and legitimacy in authoritative simulation state, actor-authority enforcement, recognized-order obligation gating, save/protocol integration, M6 AI command parity, and an approved AuthoritativeGameCommandV1 boundary that avoids forbidden client-core changes.

tests_run.result: PASS after R3 fix: format:check, lint, recursive typecheck including client-core, and architecture boundaries.
PASS: Node and worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, and M5 playable loop.
PASS: architecture, determinism, root Vitest 37 files / 259 tests, web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests.
VALID before lead R3 ACCEPT update; final validation is run after this handoff is written.
No whitespace errors before lead R3 ACCEPT update.

decisions: ACCEPT: AuthoritativeGameCommandV1 is approved as the M6 authoritative command union for downstream simulation/save/AI tasks.
ACCEPT: legacy GameCommandV1 remains pre-M6 for current client/M5 surfaces; M6 client tasks must explicitly opt into authoritative commands or define narrower client command types.
ACCEPT: M6 player and AI diplomacy/legitimacy commands use the same SimulationMessageV1 submit/preview parser/evaluator path without hidden AI-only privilege.
ACCEPT: sim-core authority validation remains the domain guard after parsing; the type split does not weaken command authorization.
ACCEPT: no forbidden client-core, app/UI, docs, PROJECT_STATUS, server, telemetry, manual node battle, or arbitrary scripting scope was added.
Proceed to final lead gates, PR, CI, merge to main, and only then mark task CLOSED.
risks: parseGameCommandV1 keeps its historical name while returning AuthoritativeGameCommandV1; downstream docs/tasks should use explicit type names.
Future M6 client-facing work must avoid accidentally broadening legacy GameCommandV1 without task authorization.
Untracked ui-samples/ remains unrelated and untouched.
requested_action: Run final integration gates, open and merge PR, sync main, then close M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 and continue to the next READY M6 task.
